---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in behavior, schema, tooling, or docs
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Affected Area

- core
- mcp-server
- schemas
- docs
- adapters
- other

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Reproduction

Provide steps, sample input, or environment details.

## Security or Scope Impact

Does this affect visibility boundaries, retention, redaction, or audit behavior?
